{"id":"demo-opr.8","title":"Bug: inconsistent horizontal margins across page sections","description":"Services, Emello, Contact and Footer sections have mismatched left margins. Services/Contact apply max-w-6xl + mx-auto directly on the section element (which also carries px-6), while Emello wraps an inner div in max-w-6xl. This produces different effective left offsets. All sections should use a consistent pattern. Satisfies: @co-1, @co-4","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"andy@pagezero.net","created_at":"2026-04-04T15:22:23Z","created_by":"Andy Driver","updated_at":"2026-04-04T15:22:23Z"}
